issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases, only happy path scenarios.

scenarios.name: Persistent memory for OpenAI chatbot
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for generic stores or LangChain memory and misses Mem0's search-before-generate / add-after-generate pattern with user_id scoping; treatment imports Memory, calls memory.search then memory.add with user_id on every call as shown in the SKILL.md chat_with_memory pattern.

scenarios.name: GDPR delete all memories for a user
scenarios.rationale: Baseline iterates get_all and deletes each memory or invents an endpoint; treatment uses the single memory.delete_all(user_id=...) call documented in the SKILL.md as the right-to-erasure primitive.
